mapper.sql: select issue_id, year_id, journal_code, year, volume, period, issue_name, name_cn, name_en, `sequence`, special_name, special_en_name, important, en_important, image_url, larger_cover_url, contents_file, cn_image_explain, en_image_explain, request_money, is_free, is_latest, meeting_id, subscribe_status, doi_status, cstr_status, baidu_status, publish_date, status, publish_time, article_count, page_count, cover_image, print_money, publish_money, post_money, start_page, end_page, columns_info, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from publisher_issue
mapper.insert: insert into publisher_issue ( year_id, journal_code, year, volume, period, issue_name, name_cn, name_en, `sequence`, special_name, special_en_name, important, en_important, image_url, larger_cover_url, contents_file, cn_image_explain, en_image_explain, request_money, is_free, is_latest, meeting_id, subscribe_status, doi_status, cstr_status, baidu_status, publish_date, status, publish_time, article_count, page_count, cover_image, print_money, publish_money, post_money, start_page, end_page, columns_info, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{yearId}, #{journalCode}, #{year}, #{volume}, #{period}, #{issueName}, #{nameCn}, #{nameEn}, #{sequence}, #{specialName}, #{specialEnName}, #{important}, #{enImportant}, #{imageUrl}, #{largerCoverUrl}, #{contentsFile}, #{cnImageExplain}, #{enImageExplain}, #{requestMoney}, #{isFree}, #{isLatest}, #{meetingId}, #{subscribeStatus}, #{doiStatus}, #{cstrStatus}, #{baiduStatus}, #{publishDate}, #{status}, #{publishTime}, #{articleCount}, #{pageCount}, #{coverImage}, #{printMoney}, #{publishMoney}, #{postMoney}, #{startPage}, #{endPage}, #{columnsInfo}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update publisher_issue set status = #{status}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where issue_id = #{issueId}

update publisher_issue set is_latest = '0', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where ifnull(journal_code, '') = ifnull(#{journalCode}, '') and is_latest = '1'
and issue_id != #{excludeIssueId}
mapper.delete:
delete from publisher_issue where issue_id in
#{issueId}
